## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss partnership terms and potential improvements between Growth X and AirOps.](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AirOps proposed a new partnership model with a 50% discount on usage costs and a platform fee for Growth X](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Both parties identified areas for improvement in workflow integration, customer conversion, and co-marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Growth X expressed concerns about scalability and the need for more robust features to justify costs](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Model Proposal

  - [AirOps suggested a 50% discount on usage costs for Growth X](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Proposed a platform fee to cover enterprise features and customization options](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Discussed the potential for white-labeling and abstracting value for Growth X clients](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

### Technical Integration Challenges

  - [Growth X highlighted difficulties in re-architecting workflows to fit AirOps' instance model](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Discussed need for improved permissioning, credentials management, and multi-tenant capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [AirOps committed to addressing these issues to facilitate easier integration](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

### Customer Conversion and Revenue Growth

  - [Both parties acknowledged challenges in converting $200/month customers to higher-value accounts](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Discussed strategies for upselling and capturing more value from shared B2B audience](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [Identified need for better showcasing of use cases and potential value to clients](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

### Co-Marketing and Deal Flow

  - [Growth X requested more support in deal flow and co-marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [AirOps suggested account planning for larger deals and better targeting of managed solution prospects](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [Both agreed to develop a more structured approach to joint marketing and sales efforts](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)

### Product Feature Requests

  - [Growth X highlighted pain points with current grid functionality and database limitations](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Discussed potential improvements to make the grid more robust and easier to use as a database](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [AirOps requested a detailed video outlining specific issues to prioritize development efforts](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Growth X to send a detailed video outlining product issues and feature requests](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [AirOps to develop and share marketing plans and co-promotion strategies](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
  - [AirOps to provide a more thoughtful response on partnership terms and product improvements](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Both parties to explore account planning for larger deals and improved targeting of prospects](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [Continue discussions on how to better align incentives and capture value from shared customers](https://fathom.video/share/2xJg7bDLgLUCA__kSigiirc8KGKdhwsy?tab=summary&timestamp=2026.0)
